violations.text: The cutting board of the sandwich/salad prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in condenser fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
A section of the wall in the storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was washed, rinsed, and sanitized at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

A package of lobster meat in reduced oxygen packaging (ROP) was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler without being removed from packaging. Fish products within ROP packaging must be removed from packaging prior to thawing. PIC removed product from packaging at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. The floor in the walk-in cooler was observed to have missing material and is not intact. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The fan guards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
